League Champion: Boston Celtics

Most Valuable Player: Nikola Jokić (26.4/12.4/9.0)

Rookie of the Year: Victor Wembanyama (21.4/10.6/3.9)

PPG Leader: Luka Dončić (33.9)

RPG Leader: Domantas Sabonis (13.7)
